title: Login page not loading
description: Users report that the login page returns a 500 error when accessed from the main website.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Transactions are timing out during checkout for credit card payments.

title: UI alignment issue on dashboard
description: Widgets overlap on smaller screen sizes (13-inch laptops).

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset emails are not being delivered to users.

title: Incorrect invoice calculation
description: Tax is being calculated incorrectly for EU customers.

title: Mobile app crashes on launch
description: Android version 14 users experience crashes immediately after opening the app.

title: Data export feature slow
description: CSV exports take more than 2 minutes for datasets over 10,000 records.

title: Search functionality returns incomplete results
description: Search queries do not return all relevant records when filtering by date.

title: API rate limit too restrictive
description: Clients are hitting the rate limit during peak hours causing service disruption.

title: Notification emails duplicated
description: Users receive duplicate email notifications for the same event.

title: User role permissions incorrect
description: Standard users can access admin-only settings page.

title: File upload size limit unclear
description: Users are not informed about the 25MB upload limit and receive generic error messages.

title: Slow response from reporting module
description: Monthly financial reports take too long to generate during end-of-month processing.

title: Session expires too quickly
description: User sessions are expiring after 5 minutes of inactivity instead of the configured 30 minutes.

title: Two-factor authentication not working
description: SMS codes are not being validated correctly during login.
